overview: Notepad++ markdown viewer plugin. Native C++ DLL using Microsoft WebView2 to render a markdown preview pane inside Notepad++. Built with CMake (CMakeLists.txt + CMakePresets.json). MarkdownPlusPlus.Native/src/ holds the plugin source (PluginController, PreviewWindow, WebViewHost, MarkdownRenderer, ClipboardUtil, HtmlUtil, NppApi, PluginOptions, WinUtil, etc.). MarkdownPlusPlus.Native/assets/ ships preview.css, preview.js, and the mermaid bundle that the WebView loads. tools/ has PowerShell/Python helpers (build-native.ps1, install-native-deps.py, install-native-plugin.ps1).
graph:
PluginExports.cpp -> PluginController (DLL entry points; Notepad++ calls these)
PluginController -> PreviewWindow (docks/undocks the preview)
PluginController -> PluginOptions (load/save plugin config)
PreviewWindow -> WebViewHost (manages the WebView2 lifecycle)
WebViewHost -> MarkdownRenderer (markdown -> HTML)
WebViewHost -> assets/preview.css + preview.js + mermaid/ (loaded into the WebView)
MarkdownRenderer -> HtmlUtil (HTML sanitize/escape helpers)
PluginController -> ClipboardUtil, WinUtil (Windows API helpers)
NppApi.h -> Notepad++ plugin interface declarations
CMakeLists.txt -> MarkdownPlusPlus.Native/src/** (build target)
